author: My Ky Quan
description: Import Kindle highlights and notes from a local My Clippings.txt file into Markdown notes. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: My Ky Quan
manifest.description: Import Kindle highlights and notes from a local My Clippings.txt file into Markdown notes.
manifest.name: Kindle Local Sync

name: Kindle Local Sync

releases.author: mykyquan
releases.description:
## Kindle Local Sync 0.1.4

This release remediates the release-blocking findings reported by the Obsidian automated plugin review.

### Validation

- 36 release-blocking risks resolved
- 0 release-blocking automated-review ESLint risks
- 605 tests passed
- Type-check passed
- Lint passed
- Production build passed
- Packaging validation passed
- Remediation-focused packaged-artifact smoke test passed
- Minimum supported Obsidian version: 1.5.7

### Runtime smoke coverage

- Creation of a previously nonexistent highlights folder
- Existing-note update with unrelated custom frontmatter
- Ignored-highlight cleanup
- Preservation of personal content outside the managed region
- Existing-notes-without-data recovery
- No duplicate note or managed region

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/mykyquan/kindle-local-sync/compare/0.1.2...0.1.3
